b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|cube.description: Path to a GeoParquet occurrence cube. Google Cloud Storage paths such as gs://bucket/data.parquet are supported when runner credentials allow access. Local files must be visible inside the BIAB runner, for example /userdata/data.parquet; host paths such as /Users/... are not mounted in the runner container.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|cube.label: Biodiversity data cube path

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|goog.description: Google Cloud project used by gcsfs when reading a gs:// cube. Leave blank for local files or default Google credentials.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|goog.label: Google Cloud project

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|chec.description: Path to a prepared GRIIS merged_distr.txt file, or to a directory containing merged_distr.txt. Local files must be visible inside the BIAB runner, for example /userdata/merged_distr.txt.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|chec.label: GRIIS checklist path

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|star.description: First year included in the Solow-Costello rate calculation.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|star.label: Start year

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|end_.description: Last year included in the Solow-Costello rate calculation.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|end_.label: End year

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|surv.description: Measure used for the observation effort map and time series. Distinct observers requires a distinctobservers column in the cube.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|surv.label: Survey effort measure

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|taxo.description: Cube column used for optional taxonomic filtering of observation effort, for example kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, or genus.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|taxo.label: Taxon rank filter

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|taxo.description: Optional taxon value used to filter observation effort. Leave blank to summarize all taxa.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|taxo.label: Taxon name filter

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|map_.description: Scale used to colour the observation effort map.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|map_.label: Map scale

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|map_.description: Geometry simplification tolerance in degrees for the interactive HTML map. Use 0 to disable simplification.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|map_.label: Map simplification tolerance

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|boot.description: Number of bootstrap iterations for the Solow-Costello confidence interval. Use 0 to skip bootstrapping.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|boot.label: Bootstrap iterations

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|rate.description: Annual observed establishment rate, Solow-Costello fitted rate, and cumulative establishment values.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|rate.label: Rate of establishment table

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|rate.description: Plot of annual establishment rate, Solow-Costello fitted rate, and cumulative establishments.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|rate.label: Rate of establishment plot

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|cumu.description: Cumulative number of checklist species observed through time in the occurrence cube.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|cumu.label: Cumulative alien species

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|summ.description: JSON summary containing fitted change in rate of establishment and input metadata.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|summ.label: Run summary

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|obse.description: Self-contained interactive Leaflet/Folium map with grid cells colored continuously by observation effort and a matching legend. Use this for a correctly colored visualization.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|obse.label: Observation effort map (interactive HTML)

b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|obse.description: Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF with one pixel per grid cell, valued by observation effort (map_value scale). Renders with continuous per-pixel color styling and a legend in the BIAB embedded map, since that path applies a colormap and rescale automatically, unlike the geo+json vector viewer.
b3alien>rate_of_establishment.yml@0|obse.label: Observation effort map (raster)

metadata.name: B3ALIEN rate of establishment
metadata.description: Calculate the GBF Target 6 rate of alien species establishment from a b3alien biodiversity data cube and a prepared GRIIS checklist. The pipeline loads a GeoParquet cube from a local path or Google Cloud Storage, calculates cumulative alien species and annual establishment rates using b3alien, fits the Solow-Costello model, and exports observation effort maps and tables.
